channel.title: GitHub Trending - Nuovi in Kotlin (Monthly)
channel.description: Repository (Nuovi) più popolari in Kotlin nel periodo monthly.

item.title: 📝 sogonov/anubis (1141 ⭐)
item.description:
👤 Owner: sogonov

📝 Repository: sogonov/anubis

📄 Descrizione: Android app manager with VPN integration. Manages groups of apps by freezing/unfreezing them based on VPN connection state.

⭐ Stelle: 1141

🍴 Forks: 34

💻 Linguaggio: Kotlin

📜 Licenza: MIT License

⏰ Creato il: 2026-04-13T03:41:38Z

🔄 Ultimo Aggiornamento: 2026-05-11T22:34:23Z

Visita il Repository su GitHub

]]>

item.title: 📝 iampedii/WhiteDNS (503 ⭐)
item.description:
👤 Owner: iampedii

📝 Repository: iampedii/WhiteDNS

📄 Descrizione: Source-available Android DNS tunneling client with VPN and proxy modes, backed by MasterDNS & StormDNS.

⭐ Stelle: 503

🍴 Forks: 44

💻 Linguaggio: Kotlin

🏷️ Topics: vpn vpn-client

📜 Licenza: Other

⏰ Creato il: 2026-05-10T05:27:42Z

🔄 Ultimo Aggiornamento: 2026-05-19T20:10:59Z

Visita il Repository su GitHub

]]>

item.title: 📝 jegly/Box (426 ⭐)
item.description:
👤 Owner: jegly

📝 Repository: jegly/Box

📄 Descrizione: Private on-device AI suite for Android. Fork of Google AI Edge Gallery with llama.cpp, whisper.cpp, stable-diffusion.cpp, GGUF import, voice chat, vision AI, on-device image generation, biometric lock, encrypted history, and CPU/NPU/GPU acceleration.

⭐ Stelle: 426

🍴 Forks: 21

💻 Linguaggio: Kotlin

🏷️ Topics: ai-assistant android-ai-app artificial-intelligence box gguf google litert litert-llamacpp litert-lm llamacpp local-ai ondevice-ai v2v visionai

📜 Licenza: Other

⏰ Creato il: 2026-04-17T10:42:52Z

🔄 Ultimo Aggiornamento: 2026-05-16T03:42:40Z

Visita il Repository su GitHub

]]>

item.title: 📝 okhsunrog/vpnhide (339 ⭐)
item.description:

📝 Repository: okhsunrog/vpnhide

item.title: 📝 NucleusFramework/ComposePdfReader (49 ⭐)
item.description:
👤 Owner: NucleusFramework

📝 Repository: NucleusFramework/ComposePdfReader

📄 Descrizione: A Kotlin Multiplatform PDF rendering and text-extraction library built on top of pdfium and Compose Multiplatform. Compose-first API, and a sample desktop/mobile reader with thumbnails, progressive rendering, and selectable text.

⭐ Stelle: 49

🍴 Forks: 2

💻 Linguaggio: Kotlin

🏷️ Topics: android compose compose-multiplatform ios jvm kotlin-multiplatform pdf pdf-reader pdf-viewer pdfium wasm

📜 Licenza: MIT License

⏰ Creato il: 2026-04-19T17:13:40Z

🔄 Ultimo Aggiornamento: 2026-05-13T17:22:42Z

Visita il Repository su GitHub

]]>

item.title: 📝 iamjosephmj/DeviceIntelligence (28 ⭐)
item.description:
👤 Owner: iamjosephmj

📝 Repository: iamjosephmj/DeviceIntelligence

📄 Descrizione: Open-source Android device-intelligence telemetry SDK. Hardware-backed key attestation, bootloader integrity, root indicators, in-process tampering, emulator probe, app-cloner signals — emitted as a single deterministic JSON report. Telemetry, not RASP.

⭐ Stelle: 28

🍴 Forks: 1

💻 Linguaggio: Kotlin

🏷️ Topics: android android-security anti-fraud attestation bootloader device-fingerprinting emulator-detection fraud-detection gradle-plugin key-attestation kotlin play-integrity root-detection security strongbox telemetry

📜 Licenza: Apache License 2.0

⏰ Creato il: 2026-04-28T00:59:07Z

🔄 Ultimo Aggiornamento: 2026-05-19T18:01:03Z

Visita il Repository su GitHub

]]>
